summary: Added topic assignment to 6 task creation points across 5 files using Mode C suggest-wrap (fix-it, review), Mode A picker-insert (project-overview), and Mode B inherit-with-fallback (spawn, task --expand, task --review). All inline jq active_topics manipulation replaced with manage-topics.sh calls. All 5 files mirrored to extension copies under .claude/extensions/core/.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary covering Mode C (fix-it, review), Mode A (project-overview), Mode B (spawn, task --expand, task --review) patterns and extension copy sync
